Class OpenMiserie

java.lang.Object
whistapp.domain.bids.Bid
whistapp.domain.bids.Miserie
whistapp.domain.bids.OpenMiserie
public class OpenMiserie extends Miserie
Represents an Open Miserie bid (0 cards, but with the possibility of showing cards)

      public OpenMiserie(ArrayList<Player> declarers) throws IllegalArgumentException

  • Method Details

    • getOpenMiserieHands

      public HashMap<Player,String[]> getOpenMiserieHands(Player currentPlayer)
      Description copied from class: Bid
      A getter for finding the open miserie hands the given player can see. This means the player's own hand will never be included in the output.
      Overrides:
      getOpenMiserieHands in class Bid
      Parameters:
      currentPlayer - The current player that needs to see the hands.
      Returns:
      A map of players with their hands. This map is empty if the bid isn't open miserie, or if the other players haven't bid open miserie.

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Overrides:
      toString in class Miserie

    • getBaseValue

      protected int getBaseValue()
      Returns the base value for the open miserie. Base value is 14 (so total is 42).
      Overrides:
      getBaseValue in class Miserie
      Returns:
      The base value of the open miserie bid.
